parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ (() => { const input = $items('Build Full-Text Cypher')[0].json; const sessionId = 'ks-' + Date.now().toString(36); const resultStr = JSON.stringify({ answer: $json.answer, cypherUsed: input.cypherUsed, matchCount: $items('Build Answer Prompt')[0].json.matchCount }).slice(0, 2000); return { statements: [{ statement: 'MERGE (s:SpecSession {sessionId: $sessionId, project: $project, graph: $graph}) SET s.mode = $mode, s.prompt = $prompt, s.result = $result, s.createdAt = $createdAt', parameters: { sessionId: sessionId, project: input.project_name, graph: 'SpecGraph', mode: 'query', prompt: input.prompt_text, result: resultStr, createdAt: new Date().toISOString() } }, { statement: 'MATCH (s:SpecSession {sessionId: $sessionId, graph: $graph}) MERGE (c:SpecClass {name: \'SpecSession\', graph: $graph}) MERGE (s)-[:INSTANCE_OF]->(c)', parameters: { sessionId: sessionId, graph: 'SpecGraph' } }] }; })() }}
